segment.source: A grid of category cards that guide buyers into priced or themed sections, each card pairing a category title with an optional item count and short description. Use it on shop, pricing, or directory pages as a navigational entry point into deeper offerings. Fields include an intro of eyebrow, headline, and sub-headline, a two-to-four column selector, and a repeatable category collection with title, count, rich-text description, and an explore link.
